sources.name: Google CTF
sources.notes: Public Google CTF challenge archive. Use web challenge subdirectories only for v1 curation.

sources.name: Project SEKAI CTF
sources.notes: Public Project SEKAI CTF archive. Confirm license and select web services only.

sources.notes: Public HKCERT CTF challenge archive. Confirm challenge paths and license before bundle inclusion.

sources.name: idekCTF 2024
sources.notes: Public CTF challenge archive. Use only web tasks with reproducible Docker assets.
